title: Star Name Registry Extra Bright Star Package. Name a UK visible star
features: Our Extra Bright Stars shine brighter in the Night sky
All stars are entered into the online register
Use the Find My Star Mobile App to locate your star
Customise your star for your loved ones
description: Product Description The universe is calling - Name a star and give the gift of a lifetime As seen on TV! From our show stopping Customer Support Team to our Luxury Presentation Packages, at Star Name Registry we take pride in our dedication to providing all of our customers with the best-personalised gifting experience. You may not be able to take your loved ones to space, but you can share the wonders of the cosmos and bring a little piece of it back into your home. The ideal present for any time of year A gift that will last a lifetime - what better way to show those special to you, just how much you really care? Whether you’re looking for that unique Christmas gift for your sister, the foolproof anniversary present for your partner, or simply trying to find the perfect surprise for that person in your life who has everything; our star name packages are a thoughtful way to show that you care. Preserve the memory of those you hold most dear and immortalise them forever amongst the stars within a database of over two million stars! The perfect gift for a birthday or anniversary; an amazing christening or Christmas gift. Not just your typical present, show someone special just how much you care by gifting something truly magical. We truly understand just how important the little details are when it comes to a gift so unusual! With a range of customisation options, personalisable features and high-quality products, curate the perfect package to create a gift just as one-of-a-kind as the lucky recipient. All of our fortunate giftees receive their custom star packages in the post, allowing them to proudly display these in their home, office or anywhere they wish to show off your impeccable gifting. All packages include: A Custom Star Name Deed - Proudly display the astronomic co-ordinates and positioning of the Star amongst the constellations with your embossed Star Name Deed Certificate Access to the Online Register - View your star online through the online register and the Find My Star Mobile App Constellation and Universe Explained Fact Sheets - to help deepen the understanding for new space explorers and veterans alike! Why give the typical, when in a few easy steps, you could gift the extraordinary? Register your star name Make someone's night View your star online Show it off
